query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description_fr IS NOT NULL AND description_fr != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_desc_fr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN video_url IS NOT NULL AND video_url != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_video,
  SUM(CASE WHEN client_name IS NOT NULL AND client_name != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_client
FROM projects;

  SUM(CASE WHEN client_name IS NOT NULL AND client_name != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_client
